name: 新房洞房
era_style: 明代晚期官宦府邸新房
description: 喜庆华丽的洞房新房，中央红罗帐床铺设锦被，喜烛摇曳照亮丝带手腕道具。水盆置于床侧，门外有陆婢女叩门痕迹，整体红色调为主，私密而暧昧。
visual_reference: Luxurious wedding night bridal chamber in late Ming dynasty mansion, ornate red silk canopy bed with embroidered drapes, flickering red candles, silk ribbon props, water basin stand, intimate red-dominated interior with carved furniture, soft candlelight glow, highly detailed cinematic
lighting: 夜间喜烛温暖摇曳光线，营造亲密氛围
emotional_range: 圆房后的讥诮对峙到女主催促困倦
